title: Kamehame Acrylic Display Box with Lid Clear Small Boxes 4 Pcs 10 x 10 x 10 cm / 3.9 x 3.9 x 3.9'' Square Cube Boxes Storage Containers Organiser for Candy Pill Jewelry Makeup and Gift Box
features: Size: Each of our clear acrylic display boxes has a size of 10 x 10 x 10 cm. The small acrylic box is exquisite and compact, making it easy to carry. Which can be used as a display to add more beautiful colours to your room and give you more experience.

Material: the small storage box with lid is made of acrylic to clearly see the contents and provide an elegant presentation for your collectibles. Make it a great organizing tool for all the knick-knacks on your desk or in your drawer, home and office.

Acrylic box with lid: The separate container has a separate lid that can place the small items separately, which is easy to identify. It is very suitable as a desk organiser or cosmetic storage container or a small items storage box on the kitchen counter. It makes any room look tidy and can store all the small things, you don't have to spend a lot of time looking for them again.

Exquisite workmanship: the acrylic box has fine workmanship, strong airtightness, more strength, smooth body, convenient opening and closing and convenient storage of all kinds of things. And the fully transparent design allows you to clearly see the contents of the box.

Wide application: the acrylic storage box is ideal for crafts and can be decorated with coloured ribbons, flowers, stickers or charms. Ideal for candy, cupcake, cookie, candy, candle, collectible, paper clips, stamps, change, rings, makeup, cotton balls, dolls, jewelry and so on. Ideal for shop windows, counter displays and exhibitions. Add balloons, sweets or chocolate for birthday, baby party or bridal shower.
